Author: Ruby Blaire
Name: SceneKeeper
Description: A lightweight SFW roleplay scene assistant for tracking RP partners, organizing and filtering captured chat, pinning important lines, saving searchable scene history, tracking and sharing follow-ups, checking Scene Builder spelling, exporting Markdown recaps, using the guided Scene Builder, and making active scenes easier to follow.
Punchline: Keep your RP scenes organized, visible, and easy to follow.
